notes: Emergency Telegram login/session hotfix. Stops Bridge from automatically deleting Telegram MTProto session files during login/auth checks or credential edits. Reset is now manual-only, reset/login first releases the Telethon listener and retries session-file deletion to avoid Windows file-lock errors, and the UI now shows preserved-session warnings instead of the old reset error. Keeps the v7.26 broker-symbol compatibility, XAUAUDm handling, safer XAUUSD quote selection, audit/test-sender improvements, and History tab Clear Expired button.
